revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24644718927|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ayabusuma Shrine
| native_name = 綾衾神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Ayabusuma Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|35.375157|136.794561}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| website = {{Official website|https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=163&shrname=%E2%98%85%E7%B6%BE%E8%A1%BE%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE%E2%98%85}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ayabusuma Shrine'''|綾衾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province|ja|尾張国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11465292|1=List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province}}
** Series ordinal: 45
** P155: {{ill|Q11585161|ltq=Q11585161|qid=Q11585161|1=Ishizukuri Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135039494|ltq=Q135039494|qid=Q135039494|1=Kahashimano Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Owari Province|lt=Owari Province|ar|أواري|ca|Província d'Owari|ckb|پارێزگای ئۆوواری|cs|Provincie Owari|de|Provinz Owari|en|Owari Province|es|Provincia de Owari|eu|Owari probintzia|fa|ولایت اوواری|fi|Owarin provinssi|fr|Province d'Owari|gl|Provincia de Owari|hak|Owari-koet|id|Provinsi Owari|it|Owari (provincia)|ja|尾張国|ko|오와리국|lt|Ovario žemė|nl|Owari (provincie)|pl|Prowincja Owari|pt|Província de Owari|ru|Овари (провинция)|simple|Owari Province|sk|Owari (provincia)|sr|Провинција Овари|tr|Owari (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Оварі|vi|Tỉnh Owari|wuu|尾张国|zh_min_nan|Owari-kok|zh_yue|尾張國|zh|尾張國|qid=Q514506|1=Owari Province}}
* {{ill|Q1032507|ltq=Q1032507|qid=Q1032507|1=Haguri District}}
